Tests for rendering health-related cards and views in various data scenarios, and a build script.


## Files
- **[test_health_activity_detail_card.c](test_health_activity_detail_card.c.md)**: Tests for rendering the health activity detail card with various health data scenarios.
- **[test_health_activity_summary_card.c](test_health_activity_summary_card.c.md)**: Tests for rendering the health activity summary card with various step data scenarios.
- **[test_health_app_includes.h](test_health_app_includes.h.md)**: Header file for testing health app includes with fakes, stubs, and helper functions.
- **[test_health_card_view.c](test_health_card_view.c.md)**: Tests for rendering and initializing health card views in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_health_detail_card.c](test_health_detail_card.c.md)**: Tests for rendering and functionality of the health detail card in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_health_hr_detail_card.c](test_health_hr_detail_card.c.md)**: Tests for rendering the health heart rate detail card in different data scenarios.
- **[test_health_hr_summary_card.c](test_health_hr_summary_card.c.md)**: Tests for rendering the health heart rate summary card in the Pebble firmware.
- **[test_health_sleep_detail_card.c](test_health_sleep_detail_card.c.md)**: Tests for rendering the health sleep detail card in various sleep data scenarios.
- **[test_health_sleep_summary_card.c](test_health_sleep_summary_card.c.md)**: Tests for rendering the health sleep summary card in various sleep scenarios.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing health-related system apps in the Pebble firmware.
